name: iea_15_240_irregular_wave
description: IEA-15-240-RWT UMaineSemi irregular-wave cases using the local OpenFAST 2026/v5 runtime.

cases.name: iea_dlc1p1_wind8_Hs1p32_Tp8p01

comparison.label: DLC 1.1 NTM row: Wind=8 m/s, Hs=1.32 m, Tp=8.01 s, Gamma=1.0
comparison.reference: NREL/TP-5000-76773 Section 4, Table 12 and Figures 21-24 checks

cases.notes: Moderate operating case: 8 m/s steady wind plus irregular waves, with MoorDyn enabled. The original 12.8 m/s startup is intentionally not used here because this local model/controller combination tower-strikes without a matched steady-state initial condition.

cases.name: iea_parked_irregular_Hs8p1_Tp12p8

comparison.label: DLC 1.6-like parked wave-only check: Hs=8.1 m, Tp=12.8 s
comparison.reference: NREL/TP-5000-76773 Section 4 design checks; this local case is not a full DLC reproduction

cases.notes: Parked/wave-only extreme irregular-wave case. InflowWind/AeroDyn/ServoDyn are disabled to avoid zero-wind steady inflow validation.
